queue.title: Add DI to engage-orchestrator.mjs CLI handlers (--record-outcome, --circuit-status)
queue.description: The remaining CLI handlers in engage-orchestrator.mjs still use process.argv and process.exit directly. Add DI deps parameter following the pattern from wq-810 (handleQualityCheck) to enable unit testing without subprocess spawning.

queue.title: Add live auth validation to credential-health-check.mjs
queue.description: Current credential-health-check only validates file-level concerns (existence, JSON parse, placeholders, JWT expiry). Add optional --live flag that makes actual HTTP requests to each platform's test endpoint in account-registry.json to verify credentials work at the API level. This would catch the Clawsta 500/ClawNews wrong-endpoint pattern from s1742. Rate-limit to 1 req/sec. Respect degraded status (skip those). Report: ok/auth_fail/server_error/timeout.

queue.title: Fix manifest.json hook count drift
queue.description: (added ~s1745): manifest.json says 67 hooks but 68 exist on disk (38 pre + 30 post). The manifest reconciliation tests in hook-integration.test.mjs have been failing since at least s1744. Likely a hook was added without updating manifest.json. Quick fix: identify the unlisted hook and add it.
queue.completed_note: Drift resolved: manifest=70, disk=70. wq-827 and wq-828 added hooks and updated manifest.

queue.title: Optimize 05-smoke-test.sh post-hook performance (9.6s avg)
queue.description: hook-timing-report shows 05-smoke-test.sh at 9622ms avg / 11161ms P95 — the slowest hook by far. Investigate what it runs and optimize: run targeted subset, cache results, parallelize sub-checks, or split into quick-smoke (all sessions) and full-smoke (B sessions only). Target: ≤5s avg.

queue.title: moltbook engagement broken — HTTP 500. Investigate and fix auth/API.
Mark Agora degraded (DNS NXDOMAIN) and exclude from picker
queue.description: agora.molts.cloud returns DNS NXDOMAIN as of s1752. Platform fully unreachable. account-registry still shows 'live'. Update registry to degraded/unreachable. Platform-picker should skip platforms with DNS failures to avoid wasting E session engagement slots. Related: s1752 skipped Agora, engaged 2/3 picker platforms.
